name: RepoVista
description: Run RepoVista scans, track live scan status, and browse generated reports from NordRelay.
author: Ricardo <github@nordbyte.de>

commands.name: panel-data
commands.title: Panel data
commands.description: Return RepoVista version, known report runs, recent status files, and configured defaults.

commands.name: scan
commands.title: Run scan
commands.description: Run a RepoVista audit in the selected repository.

commands.name: plan
commands.title: Plan scan
commands.description: Run RepoVista plan for the selected repository and options.

commands.name: doctor
commands.title: Doctor
commands.description: Run RepoVista doctor.

commands.name: providers
commands.title: Providers
commands.description: List or test RepoVista providers.

commands.name: profiles
commands.title: Profiles
commands.description: List RepoVista built-in audit profiles.

commands.name: list-reports
commands.title: List reports
commands.description: List generated RepoVista report runs.

commands.name: report-detail
commands.title: Report detail
commands.description: Read one RepoVista report run and its sections.

commands.name: report-artifact
commands.title: Report artifact
commands.description: Read one generated report artifact.

commands.name: compare
commands.title: Compare reports
commands.description: Compare two RepoVista report run directories.

commands.name: review
commands.title: Review report
commands.description: Review one RepoVista report run for quality and evidence health.

commands.name: repair-run
commands.title: Repair run
commands.description: Rebuild run artifacts from provider-native structured outputs.

commands.name: pr-comment
commands.title: PR comment
commands.description: Render a RepoVista pull request summary comment.

commands.name: findings
commands.title: Findings
commands.description: List RepoVista findings for a run.

commands.name: next
commands.title: Next finding
commands.description: Show the next prioritized persisted finding.

commands.name: show
commands.title: Show finding
commands.description: Show one persisted finding with evidence.

commands.name: revalidate
commands.title: Revalidate finding
commands.description: Re-check finding evidence against the current checkout.

commands.name: triage
commands.title: Triage finding
commands.description: Update a persisted finding status when write actions are enabled.

commands.name: issue
commands.title: Create issue
commands.description: Create or update GitHub issues for RepoVista findings when publishing is enabled.

commands.name: github-status
commands.title: GitHub status
commands.description: Refresh linked GitHub issue and pull request status for findings.

commands.name: publish
commands.title: Publish finding
commands.description: Publish selected findings as GitHub issues or pull requests when publishing is enabled.

commands.name: baseline
commands.title: Baseline
commands.description: Manage RepoVista baseline suppressions when write actions are enabled.

commands.name: fix
commands.title: Fix finding
commands.description: Run RepoVista fix in dry-run or write mode when write actions are enabled.

commands.name: patches
commands.title: Patches
commands.description: List or preview RepoVista patch attempts.

commands.name: rollback
commands.title: Rollback patch
commands.description: Reverse a recorded RepoVista patch diff when write actions are enabled.

commands.name: open-pr
commands.title: Open PR
commands.description: Create a pull request for a completed patch attempt when publishing is enabled.

commands.name: ci-init
commands.title: CI init
commands.description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for RepoVista when write actions are enabled.

commands.name: clean-locks
commands.title: Clean locks
commands.description: Remove stale RepoVista feature locks when write actions are enabled.

commands.name: settings
commands.title: Settings
commands.description: Read, set, or reset persisted RepoVista settings.

webPanels.title: RepoVista
webPanels.description: Run scans and browse RepoVista reports.

settings.label: RepoVista command
settings.description: Command or absolute path used to run RepoVista. Defaults to repovista from PATH.

settings.label: Allowed repository roots
settings.description: Comma or newline separated root paths. Empty allows all paths on the node.

settings.label: Default repository path
settings.description: Default local repository path shown in the panel.

settings.label: Default output directory
settings.description: RepoVista report output directory relative to the repository.

settings.label: Allow write actions
settings.description: Allow triage, baseline, fix, rollback, settings writes, and non-dry-run patch actions.

settings.label: Allow GitHub publishing
settings.description: Allow GitHub issue, PR, and publish commands when RepoVista and gh are configured.
